verified.notes: Program is officially named 'Customized Caregiver Training & Relief Program' (publicly known as 'Missouri Caregiver Program'). No age, income, or asset limits found in official sources. Phone number confirmed from Missouri Department of Health & Senior Services (.gov source). Program eligibility based on care recipient diagnosis (Alzheimer's or related dementia) and residency, not financial means-testing.

programs.notes: Program is officially named 'Customized Caregiver Training & Relief Program' (publicly known as 'Missouri Caregiver Program'). verified.notes: Program requires income not to exceed 125% of federal poverty level (source: https://health.mo.gov/seniors/senioremployment/ and https://www.dol.gov/agencies/eta/seniors), but specific dollar thresholds are not provided in search results and vary by family size and year. No asset limits found in search results. Phone number is from Missouri state health department official source.
